# Platform Escalations (DIST) Context

## Overview

Platform escalation project (Jira: DIST). Used to escalate issues to the international platform team.

## Issue Types

- Request, Question, Issue
- Priority used as severity indicator

## Common Labels

- `auto-triaged`, `FeatureFlag`, `DIST_SolutionRelease`, `Audit_Squad`

## Escalation Patterns

- UKCAS bug → DIST ticket (platform issue)
- UKCAUD bug → DIST ticket (platform dependency)
- Link with `is caused by` relationship

## Recent Decisions

[Decisions will be logged here by commands]
